items.title:
[负面] 白嫖可以, 千万别氪金

普池说是有限定但是几率又不写清楚, 纯纯的诈骗

items.summary:
白嫖可以, 千万别氪金

普池说是有限定但是几率又不写清楚, 纯纯的诈骗
----------------------------------------------------
周年庆活动 再战原初 逆天肝度，每天每个角色每个命轮（装备）出战一次是吧？ 
我是真不明白从策划是怎么想的， 这傻逼活动虽然给抽卡材料但是强行让玩家每天一通， 嗯拉在线率是吧
还以为周年庆策划要做人了， 没想到还是这么逆天，既然这样本来要改的评价就维持不推荐吧

还是那句话：白嫖都不行, 更别提氪金了 没有机制全是数值

items.title: [正面] First thing first, this game is kinda amazing and ...
items.summary:
First thing first, this game is kinda amazing and super addictive. 
Let me break it down for you:
lovecraftian slay the spire with a bit of gacha elements. 

The gacha aspect is not bad at all, the game gives you hundreds of free pulls and each 5 is guaranteed an SR or above which makes it very easy to obtain a lot of characters even early on and even later on. 

The story has 9 chapters normal mode and 9 chapters hard mode which translates to a lot of content. The game also has events and the other usual gacha stuff to give even more content. 

It also has PvP which seems somewhat fair at least at low level, I don't really know about higher levels. But this said, to get the rewards from doing multiple PvP matches you don't need to be that much strong. 

As for the overall game difficulty, it's challenging just enough for you to need to think about what you are doing, even in the early stages of the story, but at the same time it's not frustratingly hard like the end game content of some other gacha games. It's fun and as I said, it's kinda addictive. 

The arts are amazing, they are lovecraftian but still animeish, I downloaded the game mostly for them but then I got stuck because of the other aspects of the game. 

There is a good variety of characters and there are a lot of mechanics to explore, each of them is really unique and fun to learn. 

I saw a lot of people complaining about the GPT translations, I'm not native English speaker but I could still understand 98% of anything that was written. There are some strange words here and there but nothing too complicated, I really don't understand the complaints. Maybe they just updated the translations in the past year and now they are kinda good? 
Don't take me wrong, I'd still prefer if they hired a professional person at least for the English translation. 


My only complaint is the amount of words, let me explain myself better. 
The story itself is very good and very dark from time to time. Without doing any spoilers, we are talking of persons pre-building their own tombstones because they know they are most likely not going to survive. 
Kids accidentally offing other kids because of extradimensional things fused onto them. Some really cool stuff. 
But the game uses a lot of words to say even the simplest of concepts. It takes strange turns around the point of the story chapter, just for the sake of time, and it extends the length of every single story encounter way too much. 
The same problem applies to the effects of some mechanics. While in slay the spire they use the fewest words possibile to say what a card or a mechanic does, here it is the exact opposite. It's better to just try a mechanic or a card and see what it does instead of reading a wall of text each time. This is coming from someone who has read hundreds of books. 


Anyway I made this review in the hope that more people play this game, I don't want to see it puff off and get forgotten. It's a really good game and the team behind it seems really passionate, I hope all the best for them.
